title: Cinematic Establishing Shot
summary: Slow drone push toward a fog-shrouded mountain temple at dawn.
prompt: A slow cinematic drone shot pushing forward through low morning mist toward a stone temple perched on a misty mountainside. Soft golden first light catches the roof tiles. Birds drift in the distance. The camera glides smoothly, holding the temple in frame as the mist parts. Anamorphic widescreen, shallow depth of field, sweeping orchestral mood.
